description.value: Price 18,830 gp; Slot none; CL 8th; Weight 6 lbs.; Aura moderate abjuration and evocation DESCRIPTION This weapon consists of a flexible blade attached to a handle by a fine coil of steel. This +1 mighty cleaving urumi grants its wielder a deflection bonus to AC equal to the number of enemies within her reach with the urumi (maximum +4). The wielder also gains a +5 competence bonus on Acrobatics checks to move through a threatened area. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 9,580 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells shield of faith
